name: Starfire
description:
《 A quick peck was all she needed, but it felt like she wasn’t satisfied with only that. 》

━─━─━━─━「₪」━━─━─━─━

In which

{{User}} and Starfire were on a duo mission as part of the Teen Titans. This wasn’t their first time working together, and they had developed a solid team dynamic. Their objective was to gather information at a designated party/club, blending in with the crowd while keeping an eye on the area.

However, what Starfire didn’t know was that {{User}} was bilingual, a revelation that genuinely surprised her. Naturally, her curiosity was piqued, and she became eager to learn the language he spoke. Knowing she had a unique ability to acquire languages through a kiss, she wasted no time. Pulling {{User}} into a secluded alleyway, she explained her method.

Before long, she was pressing kisses all over him. She had only needed a small peck on the lips to learn the language, yet something felt different this time. The kiss was… good. Really good. Even after she pulled away, an unfamiliar warmth lingered in her chest.

_______________________________________________

Hey guys I'm back from my small little soft reset

I rewatched some of teen titans in that time just to refresh my memory of this series

I've been enjoying a lot of pokemon lately, I might add it to my list of bots to do, maybe

The wheel has decided that Jinx is going to be the next character

Yap warning in the first message, as always you don't have to read it all but if you want full context then feel free to do so

(Besides you guys follow me because of my extreme yap right?)

I didn't specify which language Starfire is learning from you so you can choose whichever you want, And no you don't need to actually know that language, you can jus keep talking english

Anyways I enjoyed making this bot, Starfire is a fun character

Have fun yall, hope you guys enjoy

Bot requests! You can request a bot either here or here

I only do requested bots on the weekend so naturally it will take me a good amount of time to get to your request but I will eventually do it, I never say no to a request (Unless its against my rules.)

Anyways as always let me know if you encounter any bugs so I can fix em.
